Guest confirmed unable to order · pay · login · waitlist · re
auto-recoveries · QSR-side · ISP · single account · internal ops excluded · 19 P1/P2 AARs reconciled outside rev-cat pool · actual outage windows · 3hr cap
Detailed Description read · order-loss: (11÷2,100)×80k×10%×$45 · avg 11 locs derived from reading all 324 Medium descriptions · DASH-side removed
Detailed Description read · order-loss: (5÷2,100)×80k×10%×$45 · avg 5 locs derived from reading all 121 Low descriptions · minor / localized
ingle guest · single device · single account

REPORTED INCIDENTS ONLY — 91% of guests who experience a digital ordering failure don’t report it; they simply leave (Baymard Institute / 1st Financial Training Services). True revenue at risk estimated 4–5× higher.

UNDETECTED FAILURES — incidents where no ticket was ever raised but platform signals exist. IntelliOps captures these proactively. Neither silent failures nor iceberg effect are reflected in the figures above.
Revenue at Risk = Qualifying incidents × Affected locations × Daily order volume share × Order loss rate × Average Order Value (AOV)
= derived from reading every ticket description
